title: HT1: PVP Velocity modpack
description: HT1 is a lightweight Fabric PvP modpack focused on high FPS, smooth gameplay, and better multiplayer performance.
body:
HT1 is a lightweight Fabric PvP modpack focused on high FPS, smooth gameplay, and better multiplayer performance.

# Description

HT1 is a PvP-focused Fabric modpack designed to improve FPS, reduce lag, and create a smoother Minecraft experience.

Features:

* Performance optimization mods
* Reduced stuttering and lag
* Lightweight and clean setup
* Multiplayer and PvP focused
* Better overall responsiveness

Every mod is carefully selected to keep gameplay fast, stable, and competitive-friendly.
